description: This file is a React component for an inspecting page in a frontend Next.js application. It manages state for assets and inspections, renders a form for creating new inspections, and displays a list of recent inspections with image previews.

methods.name: formatTs
methods.description: Formats a timestamp string into a localized date-time string, or returns the original string if invalid.

methods.name: InspectionsPage
methods.description: Main React component for managing and displaying asset inspections, including form handling, state management, and rendering inspection data.

methods.name: refreshAssets
methods.description: Fetches the list of assets from the backend and updates the component state.

methods.name: refreshInspections
methods.description: Fetches the list of inspections, optionally filtered by asset ID, and sorts them by timestamp.

methods.name: onSubmit
methods.description: Handles the submission of the new inspection form, including creating the inspection and updating the inspection list.
